<!-- Generated by StrongAIAutoDoc 20260314 -->

The Requirements Linter API standardizes how clients check individual statements and evaluate full specifications. It serves developers, QA engineers, and product managers through tools such as IDE extensions, a web client, and CI/CD pipelines. Clients submit typed requests for quick checks and full evaluations; the service returns minimal pass/fail signals or richer feedback and proposed rewrites. The API integrates with an authentication service for secure access and an observability platform for diagnostics, ensuring consistent, traceable linting workflows across authoring, review, and automated quality gates.

```mermaid
C4Context
title Requirements Linter API - Context Diagram

%% People
Person(dev, "Developer", "Submits requirements for quick checks during authoring")
Person(qa, "QA Engineer", "Enforces quality gates on specifications")
Person(pm, "Product Manager", "Reviews feedback and proposed rewrites")

%% External Systems
System_Ext(ide, "IDE Extension", "Editor plugin invoking quick checks")
System_Ext(web, "Web App Client", "Front-end calling the API")
System_Ext(ci, "CI/CD Pipeline", "Automated builds running quality gates")
System_Ext(auth, "Auth Service", "Issues and validates access tokens")
System_Ext(obs, "Observability Platform", "Collects logs, metrics, and traces")

%% System Boundary
System_Boundary(sysb, "Requirements Linter"){
  System(api, "Requirements Linter API", "Endpoints for quick checks and full specification evaluations using typed contracts")
}

%% Relationships: People to Tools
Rel(dev, ide, "Authors requirements via")
Rel(pm, web, "Reviews results with")
Rel(qa, ci, "Configures and monitors")

%% Relationships: Tools to API
Rel(ide, api, "Calls quick check with IQuickCheckRequest, receives IQuickCheckResponse over HTTPS")
Rel(web, api, "Submits ISpecificationEvaluationRequest, receives ISpecificationEvaluation over HTTPS")
Rel(ci, api, "Runs automated checks over HTTPS")

%% Relationships: API to External Services
Rel(api, auth, "Validates tokens for requests")
Rel(api, obs, "Emits logs, metrics, and traces")
```

Key components and interactions:
- Requirements Linter API: Central system offering quick checks and full evaluations using stable TypeScript contracts for interoperability.
- Users: Developers initiate ad-hoc checks in the IDE; QA engineers automate gates in CI/CD; product managers review outputs in a web client.
- External clients: IDE extension and web app call HTTPS endpoints; CI/CD runs batch linting during builds.
- Supporting services: Authentication validates tokens to secure endpoints; observability ingests logs, metrics, and traces for reliability, performance monitoring, and troubleshooting across sessions.
